meta.title: thinkthinking — AI Product Builder · ZenMux.ai Co-Founder
meta.description: thinkthinking — AI technical product manager. Product lead & co-founder of ZenMux.ai, the LLM insurance company. Previously AgentOS enterprise agent platform, Baidu PaddlePaddle open source, CATL autonomous-driving perception. Research on model identity, token economics and agent harness.

hero.titleAria: Send a random specimen flying into the masthead

work.title: Work
work.note: from perception algorithms to LLM infrastructure

research.title: Research
research.note: real questions, answered with real data

zenmux.body: Designed the “LLM insurance company” from zero to one: unified OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini protocols, provider routing, automatic failover, fallback models, observability and billing — call insurance and high availability for agent and AI-coding workloads.
zenmux.fact: 4 protocols unified · global mainstream providers · ~2M content views · ~$100k attributable conversion

tbox.body: Owned the agent development platform for Tbox (百宝箱): developer-facing agent building and orchestration, the end-to-end flow from create and debug to publish — so developers can compose and iterate agents efficiently on Tbox.
tbox.fact: agent dev platform · build / orchestrate / debug / publish

agentos.body: Proposed “Copilot design facing Autopilot”; led the end-to-end architecture — agent lifecycle, control/LLM/skill engines, XUI, task flows, knowledge base and data engine; ran an ~30-person R&D team across complex enterprise and government scenarios.
agentos.fact: 9 major releases · 20+ enterprise/gov customers · 100+ industry skills · 20+ industry agents

baidu.body: Owned AI Studio LLM products and the PaddleX pipeline tooling; ran the PaddleDetection / Paddle3D open-source ecosystem — shipped RT-DETR and PP-YOLOE+, grew a 10k-developer community, launched ERNIE Bot applications.
baidu.fact: PaddleDetection 10k+ stars · GitHub Trending multiple times · 1000+ enterprise POC leads

catl.note: CATL · perception algorithms to mass production
catl.body: Built visual perception for autonomous driving (2D/3D detection, tracking, lane finding), deployed on Xavier via TensorRT with on-vehicle delivery; designed the wireless-BMS frequency-hopping architecture into mass production; drove V2G products and national standards.
catl.fact: LKA / AEB on-vehicle · wireless BMS in production · V2G pilot stations
